name: Slime RNG
description: RNG slime-style Roblox games: quick code copy, hub guides, and trade or roll planning tools as we expand coverage.

faq.question: Why is the codes list empty?
faq.answer: Slime-style RNG games rotate codes quickly and sources vary by update. We publish active codes when verified; check back after major patches or follow official game channels for drops.

faq.question: Where is the calculator?
faq.answer: Open Calculator from this game card on the home page or use Quick navigation on the hub. Mechanics differ by title — enter values from the same tier or value list you trust.
